name_cn:
Top quality factory, complete packaging
Classic Lady, iconic letter charm, classic quilt, excellent sheepskin touch, a must-have 3-grid mini bag 😍. Charming, elegant and full of presence 💃🏻, handheld or crossbody is very feminine, classic fashion style. A beauty everyone has on Instagram and many fashion icons, don't miss it ❤️
size:17*7*15cm
